name: Blindingbeam
summary: Unleashes a blinding beam of light that momentarily disorients anyone who looks directly at it.
effect_description: Unleashes a blinding beam of light that momentarily disorients anyone who looks directly at it. A square emit/control recipe that channels light discipline into sonic output. It applies a beam pattern against self across self reach with immediate persistence.
